# baqk

> Smart back navigation with state preservation for React apps. ESM-only. Requires react >= 18.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/README.md)

## Import Paths

```ts
// Main export — hooks, generic adapter, types, storage, factory
import { useBaqk, useTrailClick, BaqkAdapter, createBaqkAdapter, createMemoryStorage, createSessionStorage } from "@thrylm/baqk";

// React Router adapter
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/react-router";

// Next.js App Router adapter
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/next";

// TanStack Router adapter
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/tanstack";
```

## Adapter Setup

### React Router

```tsx
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/react-router";

function App() {
  return (
    <BaqkAdapter>
      <RouterProvider router={router} />
    </BaqkAdapter>
  );
}
```

### Next.js App Router

```tsx
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/next";

export default function Layout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <BaqkAdapter>{children}</BaqkAdapter>;
}
```

### TanStack Router

```tsx
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk/adapters/tanstack";

function App() {
  return (
    <BaqkAdapter>
      <RouterProvider router={router} />
    </BaqkAdapter>
  );
}
```

### Generic (any router)

```tsx
import { BaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk";

<BaqkAdapter
  navigate={(path) => myRouter.push(path)}
  getCurrentPath={() => window.location.pathname + window.location.search}
>
  {children}
</BaqkAdapter>
```

All adapters accept optional `sessionKey?: string` and `storage?: StorageAdapter` props.
The generic adapter additionally requires `navigate` and `getCurrentPath` props.

## Hook API

### useTrailClick

```ts
function useTrailClick(label?: string): (e?: React.MouseEvent) => void
```

Returns an `onClick` handler that pushes a trail entry without navigating. Attach to same-tab internal `<Link>`/anchor navigations — the link handles navigation natively, no `preventDefault` needed.

- Saves scroll and pushes current page onto trail on left-click
- Skips on modifier keys, middle-click, or `defaultPrevented`
- Skips new-tab, download, external, and hash-only anchor clicks
- Captures path at click time via `getCurrentPath()` (reads `window.location`, compatible with nuqs/shallow updates)
- Shares the same navId as `useBaqk()` — both use `ensureNavId` (idempotent)

```tsx
const trailClick = useTrailClick("Products");
<Link to={`/products/${id}`} onClick={trailClick}>{name}</Link>
```

### useBaqk

```ts
interface BaqkOptions {
  fallbackPath?: string;    // Path when goBack() has no trail
  autoSaveScroll?: boolean; // Auto save/restore scroll (default: true)
}

interface BaqkResult<T extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<string, unknown>> {
  goBack: (fallbackPath?: string) => void;
  previousEntry: TrailEntry | null;
  saveState: (state: T) => void;         // Save state for current page
  restoredState: T | null;               // Synchronously available saved state
  wasRestored: boolean;                  // Whether state was restored
  clear: () => void;
}

interface TrailEntry {
  path: string;
  navId: string;
  label?: string;
  timestamp: number;
}
```

Key details:
- `restoredState` is computed synchronously via a lazy ref — no useEffect needed
- Use `useTrailClick` to push trail entries — it handles scroll saving and trail push on click
- `goBack` pops the trail, navigates to the previous path, and re-stamps the navId for automatic restore

## Key Pattern: State Restoration

Use `restoredState` inside a `useState` initializer — NOT in a `useEffect`:

```tsx
// Listing page
function ProductList() {
  const { restoredState, saveState } = useBaqk<{ filters: Filters }>();
  const trailClick = useTrailClick("Products");

  const [filters, setFilters] = useState(
    () => restoredState?.filters ?? defaultFilters,
  );

  useEffect(() => { saveState({ filters }); }, [filters]);

  return products.map((p) => (
    <Link to={`/products/${p.id}`} onClick={trailClick}>
      {p.name}
    </Link>
  ));
}

// Detail page
function ProductDetail() {
  const { goBack, previousEntry } = useBaqk({
    fallbackPath: "/products",
  });

  return (
    <button onClick={() => goBack()}>
      {previousEntry ? `← ${previousEntry.label}` : "← Products"}
    </button>
  );
}
```

## Advanced

### Session key isolation

```tsx
<BaqkAdapter sessionKey={user.id}>
```

### Custom storage

```tsx
import { createMemoryStorage } from "@thrylm/baqk";
<BaqkAdapter storage={createMemoryStorage()}>
```

### createBaqkAdapter factory

```tsx
import { createBaqkAdapter } from "@thrylm/baqk";

const MyAdapter = createBaqkAdapter(() => {
  // Must return: { getCurrentPath, navigate, getHistoryState, replaceHistoryState }
  return useMyRouterAdapter();
});
```

### Limits

- Trail stack: max 50 entries (oldest evicted with their state/scroll data)
- State size: max 100 KB per entry (oversized state silently dropped with console warning)

## Source

- [Types](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/core/types.ts): BaqkOptions, BaqkResult, TrailEntry, RouterAdapter, StorageAdapter
- [Hook — useBaqk](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/hooks/baqk.ts): useBaqk implementation
- [Hook — useTrailClick](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/hooks/trail-click.ts): useTrailClick implementation
- [React Router adapter](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/adapters/react-router.tsx)
- [Next.js adapter](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/adapters/next-router.tsx)
- [TanStack adapter](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/adapters/tanstack-router.tsx)
- [Generic adapter](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/adapters/generic.tsx)
- [Adapter factory](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/context/create-adapter.tsx)

## Optional

- [Trail manager](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/core/trail-manager.ts)
- [State manager](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/core/state-manager.ts)
- [Scroll manager](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/core/scroll-manager.ts)
- [Integration tests](https://github.com/thierrylemoulec/baqk/blob/main/src/__tests__/integration.test.tsx)
